title: Docker app image pnpm activation retry
acceptanceCriteria: The shared Docker app image activates the pinned pnpm version before dependency installation instead of relying on a lazy Corepack download during pnpm install.
The pnpm activation step tolerates transient registry/network failures with bounded retries.
The image keeps using the repository-pinned pnpm@10.0.0 and pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.
The fix is limited to Docker build reliability and does not change installer launch semantics, service selection, ports, host-daemon behavior, or application runtime contracts.
Targeted verification proves the Dockerfile is syntactically/build-wise valid enough to pass the prior failing pnpm activation/download point.
Proof artifacts record the command output and a fresh verification verdict.
